name: WFBE_NEURODEF_FORT_CHECKPOINT_EAST
notes: ROADBLOCK / CHECKPOINT — MANNED EAST variant (flag WFBE_C_DEF_FORT_MANNED). Mirrors the WEST manned layout exactly; weapon family swapped to DShKM (DSHKM_TK_INS_EP1 — standard EAST/GUER/TKA static in every DEFMENU_V2 EAST composition). One manned DShK behind each bag-fence guard position, arcs converging on the stop line and approach lane.

objs.role: stop-line block — marks the halt point
left guard position — cover, arc onto the stop line
right guard position — cover, mutually supports left
MANNED DShKM — behind the left guard bags, arc onto the stop line + approach
MANNED DShKM — behind the right guard bags, arc onto the stop line + approach
